hero.title: Full Focus on Healing. Not on the Costs.
hero.subtitle: Free your patients from financial worries and enable therapies that truly work to completion.
hero.videoFallback: Your browser does not support video.

problem.title: When the Budget Dictates the Therapy.
problem.text: You know exactly which holistic treatment would help a person right now. But the patient hesitates because the costs aren't covered by their health insurance fund. This blocks the healing process and frustrates you as a practitioner because you can't fully apply your expertise.

solution.title: We take the topic of money out of the treatment room.
solution.relaxedPatientsDesc: High reimbursement through our systems removes the financial pressure. This fosters the inner calm that is essential for any healing process.
solution.sustainableTherapyDesc: Patients no longer discontinue important treatments out of concern about the bill.
solution.protectedTimeDesc: You simply hand over our information materials. We handle the entire administrative process.

steps.step1Desc: We check in just a few minutes whether our philosophy fits your practice.
steps.step2Desc: You receive our high-quality information cards free of charge for your waiting room.
steps.step3Desc: Your patients benefit immediately. You focus on what you do best.

cta.title: Become a Partner Practice for Free
cta.subtitle: Become a Healio partner in just 5 minutes. Book your introductory meeting.
